prompt: Implement average_memory_access_time(levels, memory_latency) in model.py. Each cache level is a dict with hit_latency and local_hit_rate, where the rate is conditional on reaching that level. Return the expected latency, including lookup latency at every reached cache and memory latency on a complete miss. Validate non-negative latencies and rates in [0, 1].
instruction: Implement average_memory_access_time(levels, memory_latency) in model.py.
